name: Elastic Security EDR
description: Integrates with Elastic Security (Elastic Defend) Kibana APIs for detection rules, alerts, host isolation, and endpoint management

actions.name: List Detection Rules
actions.description: Retrieve all detection rules with filtering and pagination

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of rules per page

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: KQL filter to narrow results (e.g., alert.attributes.name: 'Suspicious')

parameters.name: sort_field
parameters.description: Field to sort by (e.g., enabled, name, updated_at)

parameters.name: sort_order
parameters.description: Sort order: asc or desc

actions.name: Get Detection Rule
actions.description: Retrieve a specific detection rule by its ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The rule ID

actions.name: Create Detection Rule
actions.description: Create a new detection rule in the Elastic Security detection engine

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the detection rule

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of what the rule detects

parameters.name: risk_score
parameters.description: Risk score from 0 to 100

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Severity: low, medium, high, critical

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Rule type: query, eql, threshold, machine_learning, threat_match

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The query string for the rule (KQL or EQL)

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: JSON array of index patterns to search

actions.name: Search Alerts
actions.description: Search detection alerts using Elasticsearch query DSL

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Elasticsearch query DSL as JSON string

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

actions.name: Update Alert Status
actions.description: Update the status of one or more detection alerts

parameters.name: signal_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of alert/signal IDs to update

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status: open, acknowledged, closed

actions.name: Isolate Host
actions.description: Isolate a host from the network using Elastic Defend endpoint response action

parameters.name: endpoint_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of endpoint agent IDs to isolate

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment describing why the host is being isolated

actions.name: Release Host
actions.description: Release a previously isolated host and restore network connectivity

parameters.name: endpoint_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of endpoint agent IDs to release

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment describing why the host is being released

actions.name: Kill Process
actions.description: Terminate a process on a managed endpoint using Elastic Defend

parameters.name: endpoint_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of endpoint agent IDs

parameters.name: parameters
parameters.description: JSON object with pid or entity_id of the process to kill

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment describing why the process is being terminated

actions.name: List Endpoints
actions.description: Retrieve the list of endpoints managed by Elastic Defend

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Number of results per page

parameters.name: hostStatus
parameters.description: Filter by host status: healthy, offline, updating, inactive, unhealthy
